title: GD Baseline Findings
description: baseline_findings.json produced by gd-review-controller.py Round 1 — persists the union of codex_A + codex_B + claude self-review findings across multi-round convergence loops.

baseline_round.description: Round number this baseline was established (always 1 for initial baseline)

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when baseline was written

controller_invocation_id.description: Controller run ID that produced this baseline

branch.description: Review branch that generated this baseline

delta_snapshot.description: git stash create tree-ish or HEAD blob hash used as delta reference for Round 1

baseline_unresolved_count.description: Number of unresolved findings at time of baseline creation

findings.description: Union of all findings from codex_A, codex_B, and claude self-review; dedup key = (file, line±3, category)

id.description: Stable finding identifier, e.g. F001, F002

severity.description: P1 = blocking, P2 = non-blocking. Severity taken as max across sources.

file.description: Relative path to affected file; null if file-agnostic

line.description: Approximate line number in file; null if unknown. Dedup window is line±3.

line_window.description: Half-width of the dedup window around 'line' (default 3 if absent)

category.description: Finding category, e.g. sc_conformance, boundary, interface_contract, failure_mode, anti_fill, security

status.description: unresolved = still present; resolved = confirmed fixed in a later round

resolved_in_round.description: Round number in which this finding was confirmed resolved; null if still unresolved

source.description: Which reviewer first reported this finding. On dedup, source = first reporter.

also_reported_by.description: Other reviewers who independently reported the same finding (after dedup)

evidence.description: Evidence text from the original finding report

impact.description: Impact description from the original finding report

required_fix.description: Required fix description from the original finding report

verify.description: Verification command or assertion from the original finding report

round_history.description: Per-round status snapshots for this finding
